text: Volunteering is a conscious choice to help others and make a positive impact on the world around us. It is about support, humanity, and real actions that truly matter. Every contribution, no matter how small, helps build a stronger, kinder, and more responsible community.
startSoon: The site is under development. Launching soon 🚀
main-title: Find or provide humanitarian help — fast and safely
main-p: A volunteer coordination platform that connects people in need with verified volunteers in one transparent system
instructions__p: Humanitarian help coordination step by step
instructions-1st-block-title: Create a Request or Offer Help
instructions-1st-block-p: Submit a request for humanitarian help or offer volunteer support in minutes
instructions-2nd-block-p: Volunteers review requests and choose how they can help
instructions-3rd-block-p: Communicate details and track request status in one place
instructions-4th-block-p: Help is delivered with clear updates for everyone involved
description__title: Who is Wings of Help for
active-requests-1st-p: Browse verified requests from people and organizations who need support right now.
active-offers-1st-p: Explore current offers from volunteers and organizations ready to help.
active-offers-2nd-p: Find support or join an initiative.
active-requests-1st-block-title: Food and Hygiene Supplies Needed for IDP Family
active-requests-1st-block-p: Two elderly people need transportation from Kharkiv to Poltava. Limited mobility, minimal luggage. Evacuation required within 24 hours.
requests-page-p1: Browse verified requests from people and organizations who need support right now.
offers-page-p1: Explore offers from people and organizations ready to help.
